system.name: Spectre
system.summary: Ecosystem manifest for @phcdevworks/spectre-shell-signals — minimal reactive signal primitives.

foundation.title: Foundation
foundation.description: Base design-system packages and adapters that higher layers build on.

build.title: Build
build.description: Composition and application-facing packages built on top of the foundation layer.

@phcdevworks/spectre-shell-signals.description: Minimal, framework-agnostic reactive primitives package for Spectre applications.
notes: No Spectre design or UI dependencies — reactive primitives must stay decoupled from any design system.
Consumed by spectre-shell; prefer spectre-shell for full application bootstrap.
Build packages may compose foundation packages and collaborate within the build layer.

boundaryConstraints.rule: No dependencies on other Spectre packages.
boundaryConstraints.reason: Keeps signal primitives framework-agnostic and decoupled from any specific design system.

preferredEntrypoints.task: add reactive state signals to a Spectre application

generationRules: Do not add Spectre design or UI package dependencies to this package.
Run npm run check before staging any commit.
usageGuidance: For full application bootstrap, prefer consuming via @phcdevworks/spectre-shell.
safeDefaults: Do not import from other Spectre packages in this package.
Keep signal primitives framework-agnostic and free of design system coupling.
